case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. EVELING GERARDO BUEZO ULLOA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COILLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BYMARLEN RAMOS,LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVELING GERARDO BUEZO ULLOA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,281.80 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ULLOA, EVELING GERARDO BUEZO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-28-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ULLOA, EVELING GERARDO BUEZO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ULLOA, EVELING GERARDO BUEZO $2,281.80 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,381.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
